name: interview-dev-loop
description: Approval-gated interview, planning, implementation, and review loop for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Investigate, interview, plan, implement, and review in a loop.
interface.longDescription: Interview Dev Loop is an approval-gated development workflow. The agent investigates first, asks one multiple-choice clarification question at a time, writes a plan only after material ambiguity is resolved, waits for approval, then runs implementation and review loops until no P0/P1/P2 findings remain.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Interview Dev Loop for this coding task.
